nasb.text: Where there is no guidance the people fall, But in abundance of counselors there is victory.

esv.text: Where there is no guidance, a people falls, but in an abundance of counselors there is safety.

cnv.text: 沒有智謀，國家敗落； 謀士眾多，就能得勝。

ccb.text: 缺乏智谋，国必败亡； 谋士众多，战无不胜。

csbs.text: 没有引导，民就落败； 谋士众多，就必得胜。
